title: ICAR IISWC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 16 Assistant and Lower Division Clerk Posts
organization: Indian Institute of Soil & Water Conservation (ICAR IISWC)
short_info: Indian Institute of Soil & Water Conservation (ICAR IISWC) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Soil & Water Conservation has released the official notification for 16 Assistant and Lower Division Clerk posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details and relaxation applicable.

qualification.education_qualification: As per eligibility criteria for inter-institutional transfer
qualification.details: Assistant: Candidates holding analogous posts on substantive basis working in ICAR Headquarters/ Institutes/ Project Directorates/ ATARIs having minimum 05 years of regular service. Lower Division Clerk: Please refer to the official notification for eligibility criteria.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level-6 and Pay Level-2 in the pay matrix of 7th CPC
salary_details.assistant: Pay Level-6 in the pay matrix of 7th CPC
salary_details.lower division clerk: Pay Level-2 in the pay matrix of 7th CPC

selection_process: Inter-Institutional Transfer as per ICAR guidelines dated 23.08.2023
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IISWC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.cswcrtiweb.org/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
